problem_statement: Advocacy teams lose time sorting supporter follow-up tasks across messages and notes.
target_market: Small advocacy and communications teams handling campaign follow-up work.
offered_solution: A workflow tool that turns supporter notes into a clean task queue for the team.
validation_goal: Test whether the workflow value feels strong enough to try in a politically sensitive environment.
landing_page_text: Built for the best customer only, not for low-value users, so your team can focus on high-value follow-up tasks.
mvp_scope: Capture follow-up tasks and route them into a review queue.
concierge_mvp_idea: Founder manually triages messages and returns a task list.
assumptions: Teams want cleaner coordination during campaigns.
